titles.title: Greater Are You Who Is in Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord open up their eyes And help them realize That they are captivity For where great sin abound Much greater grace is found To help them set the captive free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Bind up the enemy Lord God of Victory I will lay down my life Singing this battle cry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Greater are you who is in me, Greater! Greater Lord Jesus, King of Kings, Greater! You set the captive free, proclaiming Liberty Greater are you my King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: They need your spirit Lord Fill them to stand before The enemy and praise Your name come lead them forth oh King Lord God of everything Jesus the Lord of heaven reigns
